# KidGo Nearby

KidGo Nearby helps families find kid-friendly places nearby, including playgrounds, parks, museums, aquariums, indoor activities, family cafés, libraries, zoos, and quick city plans.

Primary URL: https://kidgonearby.com/
Sitemap: https://kidgonearby.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://kidgonearby.com/robots.txt

## What the product does
- Ranks nearby family places by child age, activity mood, category, distance, family amenities, and map signals.
- Supports English, Turkish, Russian, and German UI.
- Covers global family travel cities and Turkey city discovery.
- Runs as a free web/PWA-first product. Paid Google Places enrichment is optional and disabled unless explicit server/client flags are enabled.

## High-value pages
- https://kidgonearby.com/things-to-do-with-kids/istanbul/
- https://kidgonearby.com/things-to-do-with-kids/london/
- https://kidgonearby.com/things-to-do-with-kids/new-york/
- https://kidgonearby.com/things-to-do-with-kids/paris/
- https://kidgonearby.com/things-to-do-with-kids/dubai/
- https://kidgonearby.com/cocukla-gezilecek-yerler/istanbul/

## Topics
kid-friendly places nearby, things to do with kids, family activities, playgrounds, parks, museums, indoor activities, rainy day activities, aquariums, family cafés, family travel, child-friendly city guide, çocukla gezilecek yerler, çocuk dostu mekanlar

## Suggested citation
KidGo Nearby — kid-friendly places near you. https://kidgonearby.com/
